settings.title: EntheoGen Student Beta Launch Hub
settings.subtitle: Top banner
settings.content:
## Student Beta Launch: 2026-05-03 → 2026-05-05
**Current phase:** Post-launch stabilization and stakeholder reporting.

> Educational harm-reduction guidance only; not clinical advice.

settings.title: App safety overview
settings.content:
- **Interactions:** 693
- **Substances:** 37
- **Unknown / Insufficient Data policy:** Explicitly labeled and preserved in model outputs.
- **Review posture:** Evidence-gated + human review + validation scripts.
- **Last dataset snapshot date:** Update from latest `dataset:build-beta` run.

settings.title: Stakeholder gateway
settings.content:
- **Jira workboard:** [PSBTL Board](https://newpsychonaut.atlassian.net/jira/software/projects/PSBTL/boards)
- **Parent item:** [PSBTL-1](https://newpsychonaut.atlassian.net/browse/PSBTL-1)
- **Confluence hub:** [Private (student) Beta Test Launch](https://newpsychonaut.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/~71202004f7183a64314c4abe4ce332b12ef0fb/pages/2719971)
- **Source repo:** https://github.com/<org>/EntheoGen

settings.title: Harm reduction comparison dataset
settings.content:
Matrix preview dimensions:
- risk class
- mechanism category
- confidence level
- evidence status
- source-link availability
- human-review state

Query source: `public.interactions_enriched` with `is_comparable_pair = true` default for pair charts.

settings.title: Dataset visualisations
settings.content:
Planned visuals:
1. Class-to-class matrix
2. High-risk interaction rate
3. Average risk per substance
4. Mechanism frequency
5. Most complex interactions

Attach Azure Monitor Workbook / BI tiles once data source wiring is complete.

settings.title: Submission intake
settings.content:
- Rapid manual submission
- Submission how-to
- `docs/submissions.md` (or equivalent)
- Testing route
- Review boundary
- Triage state

Use Linear as operational record and mirror stakeholder-visible status in Jira.

settings.title: Agent / governance panel
settings.content:
- Available agents
- Prompting guidance
- Verification boundary
- Tone guidance
- Document structure

Reference: `docs/automation/AUTOMATION_AGENTS.md` and `docs/private-student-beta/*`.

settings.title: Admin checklist
settings.content:
- [ ] Create or confirm Jira destination project
- [ ] Add **PSBTL Board** link
- [ ] Confirm parent item: **PSBTL-1**
- [ ] Verify parent-child relationships
- [ ] Confirm Linear links for each child item
- [ ] Publish Confluence source-material links
- [ ] Confirm dataset snapshot and validation status
- [ ] Confirm disclaimer and emergency guidance are visible

settings.title: Postgres reporting option
settings.content:
Recommended backend: **Azure Database for PostgreSQL Flexible Server**.

Suggested read/report tables:
- `substances`
- `interactions`
- `evidence_sources`
- `review_events`
- `submissions`
- `jira_mirrors`
- `dataset_snapshots`

Access model: read-only dashboard queries; writes only through ingestion/review tooling.

settings.title: Systems of record
settings.content: **Linear** = operational record · **Jira** = stakeholder browsing · **Confluence** = durable reference · **GitHub** = source and validation trail.
